oxView extends BoxView {
    /**
     * Public constructor
     */
    initialize(parameters) {
        super.initialize(parameters);
        this.luminoWidget.addClass('widget-gridbox');
        // display needn't be set to flex and grid
        this.luminoWidget.removeClass('widget-box');
    }
}
